name: advad-protocol-server
description: Advad Protocol - Servidor de IA Proxy y Dashboard de Leaderboard

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -c "blue,green,magenta" -n "AI-SVC,API-DB,ASTRO" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:api" "npm run start:ui"
scripts.setup: pip install -r requirements.txt && cd leaderboard-ui && npm install
